response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience, with recent direct work on TypeScript/Node.js product development and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a strong match for the role's primary stack and the AI agent requirement. Background includes React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and a clear TDD/CI/CD discipline. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically, and depth in PostgreSQL is unclear, but the breadth and adaptability across languages suggests these are learnable. Overall a strong fit worth interviewing.
strengths: Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes across 10+ years
Demonstrated engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, and teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the primary stack
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (robotic arms, mobile orchestration ~2016-2018)
Relational database depth unclear — MongoDB and MySQL listed but no PostgreSQL evidence
